# function: encode_file

Encodes already-loaded file content as a base64 data blob. Due to Terraform's limitation of representing all values as strings, this function only works with text content. MIME type detection may be added in a future version. This can be used e.g. for Building Block Definition inputs with type `FILE`, where the MIME type is ignored by the runner implementation. Use `provider::meshstack::load_file` instead to read and encode a file from disk in a single step.



## Signature

<!-- signature generated by tfplugindocs -->
```text
encode_file(content string) string
```

## Arguments

<!-- arguments generated by tfplugindocs -->
1. `content` (String) The file content to encode, e.g. loaded via built-in `file()` function.
